title: Business Presentation Masterclass
description: Slide structure, data storytelling, handling Q&A gracefully.

scenes.subtitle_en: Slide structure, data storytelling, handling Q&A gracefully.

scenes.text_en: Slide structure, data storytelling, handling Q&A gracefully. Today's focus: business presentation masterclass. Imagine losing two hours every day to meetings that could be emails.
scenes.text_pt: Apresentação: gancho→contexto→problema→solução→prova→pedido. Q&A: resposta curta + longa. Foco de hoje: business presentation masterclass. Imagine perder duas horas por dia em reuniões que poderiam ser emails.

scenes.title: Business Presentation Masterclass
scenes.body_en: Opening hook → context → problem → solution → proof → ask. Answering Q&A: 'Great question. The short answer is X. The longer answer is Y.'

examples.en: Imagine losing two hours every day to meetings that could be emails.
examples.pt: Imagine perder duas horas por dia em reuniões que poderiam ser emails.

examples.en: Our solution cut meeting time by thirty-one percent.
examples.pt: Nossa solução reduziu tempo de reunião em 31%.

examples.en: The short answer is no; the longer answer is 'not yet, but by Q4'.
examples.pt: Resposta curta é não; a longa é 'ainda não, mas até Q4'.

exercise.question: Complete: "Imagine losing two hours every day to ___ that could be emails."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Imagine losing two hours every day to meetings that could be emails."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Imagine perder duas horas por dia em reuniões que poderiam ser emails.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Our solution cut meeting time by thirty-one percent.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Our solution cut meeting time by thirty-one percent."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Nossa solução reduziu tempo de reunião em 31%.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Business Presentation Masterclass — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre business presentation masterclass. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca, give me your opening hook.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Imagine losing two hours daily to useless meetings.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What's the problem your slides establish?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Teams spend 31% of their week in low-value meetings.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How does your solution address it?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Our platform replaces meetings with async updates.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What proof do you show next?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Three pilot companies saved seven hours weekly.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do you handle a hostile question?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The short answer is no; the longer is in progress.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Opening, problem, proof, ask. Textbook clarity.

scenes.title: The boardroom pitch
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize Joca's pitch structure. Include at least three presentation techniques.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the glass boardroom, Joca walked a skeptical audience through a fifteen-minute product pitch.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Imagine losing two full hours every single workday to meetings that should have been emails.

paragraphs.speaker: Investor
paragraphs.en: Your problem slide is strong. What concrete proof do you have that your solution works?

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Three pilot companies saved seven hours of meeting time per employee per week.

paragraphs.speaker: Investor
paragraphs.en: Handling tough questions well is half of any pitch. You did both parts tonight.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Fifteen minutes, one clear story, five honest slides — the anatomy of a confident business presentation.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Business Presentation Masterclass". Slide structure, data storytelling, handling Q&A gracefully. Imagine losing two hours every day to meetings that could be emails. Our solution cut meeting time by thirty-one percent. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Business Presentation Masterclass". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Business Presentation Masterclass".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.pt_hint: Análise de notícias reais da BBC.

sources.label: TED Talks with subtitles
sources.pt_hint: Palestras reais com legenda — ouça, leia, repita.

sources.label: Cambridge Dictionary · thesaurus
sources.pt_hint: Sinônimos com exemplos — essencial em B2+.
